ingredients_text: Potatoes (53%), Pasteurised Free Range Egg (29%) (Free Range Egg and Salt), Roasted Red Pepper (14%) (Pepper, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid and Salt), Sunflower Oil and Olive Oil (1%).
